ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., USA, Canada, Europe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the region's center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the region's center */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the country's capital */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the country's capital */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the economic indicator */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the dataset belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the dataset belongs to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator the dataset represents */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the dataset comes from */,
  "data" REAL /* Economic data value */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the dataset */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the dataset */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data point belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the API key belongs to */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API key was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date of the API key */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the API key (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the visualization represents */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph, map) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the dashboard belongs to */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_data" TEXT /* Data for the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dashboard */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the dashboard is public or private */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the report represents */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the subscription belongs to */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the subscription is for */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subscription was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is for */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new report, data update) */,
  "notification_data" TEXT /* Data for the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
